## Problem statement

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Ubuntu scope check

- [ ] This fits the Ubuntu-first Laravel local-dev scope for v1
- [ ] This does not require immediate non-Ubuntu parity

## Proposed solution

What should happen?

## Alternatives considered

What else did you consider?

## Scope notes

Explain why this fits the Ubuntu-first Laravel local-dev scope.

## Compatibility notes

Call out whether this changes packaging, privileges, DNS, Caddy, PHP runtime management, or release workflow expectations.
